description_long: This is a sleek, modern fighter jet with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings, designed for high-speed aerial maneuverability. The wings are mid-mounted and feature pronounced anhedral angles, with additional winglets or canards near the nose for enhanced control. The rear of the aircraft displays twin vertical stabilizers and a pair of horizontal stabilizers, forming an H-tail configuration. The engine intake is prominent at the front, suggesting a single, powerful jet engine housed within the fuselage. The cockpit is forward-mounted and smoothly integrated into the body, likely accommodating a single pilot under an enclosed canopy. The overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and agility, typical of advanced military aircraft.
description: A modern, streamlined fighter jet with swept mid-mounted wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. The design is highly aerodynamic, featuring a prominent front engine intake and H-tail configuration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, large central engine intake, and sharply swept wings with upward-angled tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and the anhedral angle of the wings with visible canards near the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizers forming an H-tail, and the jet exhaust at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined profile, wing configuration, and engine intake beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing with sharply swept wings, pronounced anhedral angle, and forward canards; features small winglets near the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with a large front intake integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear (not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage, likely single-seat with a streamlined canopy.
